parameters.apprise_url_plus: ringc://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.client_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.secret_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_phone_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own RingCentral destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise ringc:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

client_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's RingCentral client id

from_phone_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's RingCentral from phone

secret_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's RingCentral secret

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's RingCentral token
